intro: Hieracium lasiophorum is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues. Bioactive constituents of Hieracium lasiophorum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat digestive problems, skin irritations, and other health issues.
